_comment: OpenClaw configuration for AI MSP Testbed. All LLM calls route through OpenRouter.

models._comment: Fast model for simple queries (greetings, hours, basic FAQ). Reasoning model for drafting and complex tasks.

activeHours._comment: Agent responds during business hours only. Outside hours, returns an after-hours message.
activeHours.afterHoursMessage: Thanks for reaching out to Longview Home Center! We're currently closed. Our hours are Monday through Saturday, 9 AM to 5 PM. We'll get back to you first thing next business day.

n8n._comment: Webhook base URL for n8n inside Docker network. Use service name, not localhost.

context._comment: Max 4000 tokens to keep test costs low. Increase for production.
